sentences.english: Describe a difficult decision you made recently.
Explain the process you went through.
A difficult decision I made recently was choosing to leave my comfortable job and move to a new city for a better career opportunity.
sentences.korean: 최근에 내린 어려운 결정은 편한 직장을 떠나 더 좋은 커리어 기회를 위해 새 도시로 이사하기로 한 거예요.

sentences.english: On one hand I had a stable income and close friends nearby.
sentences.korean: 한편으로는 안정적인 수입과 가까이에 친한 친구들이 있었어요.

sentences.english: On the other hand the new position offered twice the salary and room for professional growth.
sentences.korean: 다른 한편으로는 새 직위가 두 배의 급여와 전문적 성장의 여지를 제공했어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Describe a time when you overcame a fear.
The Best Way to Relieve Stress

sentences.english: I made a pros and cons list and talked to my family before deciding.
sentences.korean: 결정하기 전에 장단점 목록을 만들고 가족과 이야기했어요.

sentences.english: In the end I chose to take the risk and I'm glad I did because it's been a rewarding experience.
sentences.korean: 결국 위험을 감수하기로 했고 보람 있는 경험이었기 때문에 잘했다고 생각해요.
